english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ فِي اَرْضِهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O argument of Allah in His lands!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَيْنَ ٱللَّهِ فِي خَلْقِهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O sight of Allah on His creatures!
Peace be upon you, O light of Allah
by which those who have been guided [to the true guidance] are guided
and by which the believers are relieved!
Peace be upon you, O polite and fearful!
Peace be upon you, O sincere patron!
Peace be upon you, O ark of salvation!
Peace be upon you, O essence of life!
Peace be upon you.
May Allah send blessings to you
and upon your Household,
the pure and immaculate.
Peace be upon you.
May Allah hasten that which He has promised you;
namely, victory and prevalence of your authority.
Peace be upon you, O my master.
I am a servant of you
and I recognize the first and the last of your affair.

arabic text: اَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ بِكَ وَبِآلِ بَيْتِكَ
english translation text: I seek nearness to Allah, the Exalted, through your Household and you

arabic text: وَاَنْتَظِرُ ظُهُورَكَ وَظُهُورَ ٱلْحَقِّ عَلَىٰ يَدَيْكَ
english translation text: and I am expecting your advent and the prevalence of the truth at your hands.

arabic text: وَاَسْاَلُ ٱللَّهَ اَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: And I beseech Allah to send blessings to Mu¦ammad and the Household of Muhammad,
and to include me with those who are expecting you,
those who follow you and support you against your enemies,

arabic text: وَٱلْمُسْتَشْهَدِينَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ فِي جُمْلَةِ اَوْلِيَائِكَ
english translation text: and those who will be martyred in front of you in the group of your loyalists.
O my master, O Patron of the Age!
May Allah’s blessings be upon you
and upon your Household.
Today is Friday,
which is your day on which your advent is expected
to bring about relief to the believers at your hands,
and with one strike shall put an end to the intrigues of the infidels

arabic text: وَاَنَا يَا مَوْلاَيَ فِيهِ ضَيْفُكَ وَجَارُكَ
english translation text: On this day, O my master, I am your guest and in your vicinity

arabic text: وَاَنْتَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ كَرِيمٌ مِنْ اَوْلاَدِ ٱلْكِرَامِ
english translation text: and you, my master, are generous and the descendant of the generous people,
and you are commanded to receive your guests and neighbors hospitably;
so, receive me as your guest and neighbor.
May Allah’s blessings be upon you
and upon your Household, the immaculate.
